harness.context_description:
This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.

timing_breakdown.action: The car pulls out of the lot

full_prompt:
Context: This is taking place in 1982 Menlo Park among the boom in computers at a
RadioShack in a mall. The Radioshack has cheap consumer products and the mall
is 1970s style. The people walking around it are normal middle class people.. Film stock: 35mm film grain. Color palette: cinematic. Lighting: cinematic. Era: modern. Mood: neutral. medium shot. 0:00-0:03: The engine turns over. 0:03-0:09: The car pulls out of the lot. 0:09-0:14: The car merges into traffic.
composite_prompt: Background: The RadioShack: an electronics store inside the mall, stocked with personal electronics including a Tandy CoCo 2 computer., Orion - a 30 year old man with a long beard. He is contemplative and a professional, AMC Eagle - early 1980s four-wheel-drive station wagon, boxy design with wood paneling or rust-colored body, elevated ride height
